misc: Famous for being an ambassador for the AimPoint method for putting.
biography: Hailing from Keimola Golf, Timo prepares for his ninth appearance in the Hector Trophée 2026, marking him as one of the tournament's most seasoned and successful competitors in the pair format. His consistent presence and remarkable achievements have solidified his reputation as a significant figure within this unique annual competition.

Timo's record in the Hector Trophée is particularly distinguished by his three victories in the pair competition. These triumphs underscore his exceptional ability to forge strong partnerships and perform under pressure in the team format, a testament to his collaborative spirit and strategic acumen on the course.

While the esteemed Victor Trophy for the top individual player remains an objective he continues to pursue, Timo's dedication to the nuanced aspects of the game is evident in his advocacy for the AimPoint method for putting. This commitment to precision reflects his meticulous nature and his ongoing quest to refine every facet of his play, showcasing a drive that extends beyond mere scorecards.

As he approaches his ninth outing, Timo embodies the enduring competitive spirit of the Hector Trophée. Still an active participant in Hector events, his continued pursuit of excellence promises to add another compelling chapter to his already impressive career in this esteemed tournament.
